editinguser: Goo ma goykaw alhakey barmay goykaw [[User:$1|$1]] $2 se
userrights-groups-help:
War ga hin ka kondawey barmay goykey wey se ne:
* Bata maasante maanaa ti goykaa goo kondaa din ra.
* Bata bila nda maasa maanaa ti goykaa šii kondaa din ra.
* Handaray * ga tammaasa kaŋ war ši hin ka kondaa kaa nda war ben k'a tonton, wal'a kaa.  \
userrights-no-interwiki: War ši nda fonda ka goykaw alhakey fasal wiki tanayaŋ ga.
userrights-nodatabase: Bayhayhugu $1 ši bara wal'a šii gandaa ra. \
userrights-changeable-col: Kondawey kaŋ war ga hin k'i barmay
userrights-unchangeable-col: Kondawey kaŋ war ga hin k'i barmay
userrights-conflict: Cerehooyan goykaw alhadey barmawey ra! Taare war barmawey guna boryo nd'a tabatandi.

listgrouprights-summary:
The following is a list of user groups defined on this wiki, with their associated access rights.
A ga hin ka tee [[{{MediaWiki:Listgrouprights-helppage}}|alhabar tontoni]] ga bara boro alhakey ga.
listgrouprights-key: Maana: * Alhaku noontey right * Alhaku wanjantey

listgrouprights-removegroup-self-all: Kurawey kul kaa war boŋ kontoo ra
